descs.desc:
[BeforeAttack] Gain (highest Reson.) Atk Weight (max 2)
[BeforeAttack] Gain (highest Reson. + 1) [GazePersonality] (max 7)
[EndSkill] For 2 turns, lose 10 SP at Turn End

[BeforeAttack] Gain (highest Reson.) Atk Weight (max 4)

[EndSkill] For 2 turns, lose 10 SP at Turn End

[EndSkill] If this Skill was part of a Lust Reson., gain 1 E.G.O resource in Affinities corresponding to each of this unit's Attack Skills
[EndSkill] For 2 turns, lose 10 SP at Turn End

coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] If target has [Laceration], deal +([Laceration] on target + [Laceration] Count on target)% damage (max 20%)
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict (1 + (highest Reson. x 1.5)) [Laceration] (max 10, rounded down)
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +2 [Laceration] Count

[OnSucceedAttack] If target has [Laceration], deal +([Laceration] on target + [Laceration] Count on target)% damage (max 40%)

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +3 [Laceration] Count

coinDescs:

2040711.name: Mark of the Gaze
2040711.desc: Whenever this unit uses a base Attack Skill against an enemy, gain 1 additional E.G.O resource for a random, least-owned Affinity that doesn't correspond to the Affinity of the Attack Skill used (2 times per turn)
